title: Xtra Crunchy Chinese Almond Noodles
description: A pungent and adventurous Chinese dish featuring flaked almonds and a glassy-jelly texture, this recipe is egg-free-friendly and perfect for those looking to try something new. It combines the crunch of almonds with the savory flavor of Chinese noodles.
instructions: Cook the rice noodles according to the package instructions and set aside.
In a large skillet or wok, heat the vegetable oil over medium-high heat.
Add the flaked almonds and stir-fry until they are golden brown and fragrant.
In a small bowl, whisk together the soy sauce, oyster sauce, sesame oil, salt, and sugar.
Pour the sauce into the skillet or wok and stir to combine with the almonds.
Add the cooked noodles to the skillet or wok and stir-fry for 2-3 minutes.
In a small saucepan, combine the agar agar powder with 1 cup of water and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer for 5 minutes, or until the agar agar is dissolved and the mixture has a glassy-jelly texture.
Stir the agar agar mixture into the noodles and almonds.
Transfer the noodles to a serving platter and garnish with chopped scallions.
